---
title: "nGD comparisons"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "")
print(getwd())
```

# Directories

```{r Defining directories, messages = FALSE}
# Folders
rm(list = ls())
sample_with_n_markers = 8
marker_in_n_samples = 1
prevalence_cutoff = 0.05
avg_abundance_cutoff = 0.05
remove_rare = TRUE
unclassified_threshold = 80

metadata_dir <- "../../Data/Metadata/fertility_meta_with_new_infer_causes_double_causes.csv"
feat_table_dir <- "../../Data/GTDB_sensitive/"
path = paste0("../../StrainPhlan/sample_with_n_markers_", sample_with_n_markers, "_marker_in_n_samples_", marker_in_n_samples, "/")
long_path = paste0(path, "ngd_long/")
wide_path = paste0(path, "ngd_mat/")

file = paste0("ngd_plots_sample_with_n_markers_", sample_with_n_markers, "_marker_in_n_samples_", marker_in_n_samples)

save_dir = paste0("../../Results/strainphlan/", file, "/")
if (!file.exists(save_dir)){
  dir.create(save_dir)
}
```
 
# Libraries

```{r Loading libraries, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(readr)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(stringr)  
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggforce)
library(rstatix)
library(colorRamp2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(extrafont)
library(showtext)
font_add_google("Gafata")
showtext_auto()
library(chisq.posthoc.test)
library(vegan)
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")

options(scipen = 999)
source('packages/raw_data_analysis_utils.R')
source('packages/data_manipulations.R')
source('packages/metaphlan_functions.R')
source('packages/load_data.R')
```

# Data loading

## metaphlan compositional data

```{r load and order, message = TRUE, warning = FALSE}
# meta = order_meta(metadata_dir, feat_table_dir, "valencia_metaphlan_res", FALSE, remove_samples = c(""))
meta = order_meta(metadata_dir, feat_table_dir, "valencia_metaphlan_res", FALSE)

metaphlan <- read_tsv2(file.path(feat_table_dir, "../GTDB_sensitive/metaphlan4_taxonomy_METAPHLAN4.tsv"), cmnt = "#")

t_metaphlan <- reorganize_metaphlan_table(metaphlan, 't')
t_metaphlan_lst <- sep_one_organ_metaphlan(t_metaphlan, rem = TRUE, remove_rare = FALSE, prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff, remove_unclassified_column = TRUE, unclassified_threshold = unclassified_threshold)

sp_metaphlan <- reorganize_metaphlan_table(metaphlan, 's')
sp_metaphlan_lst <- sep_one_organ_metaphlan(sp_metaphlan, rem = TRUE, remove_rare = FALSE, prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff, remove_unclassified_column = TRUE, unclassified_threshold = unclassified_threshold)

ge_metaphlan <- reorganize_metaphlan_table(metaphlan, 'g')
ge_metaphlan_lst <- sep_one_organ_metaphlan(ge_metaphlan, rem = TRUE, remove_rare = FALSE, prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff, remove_unclassified_column = TRUE, unclassified_threshold = unclassified_threshold)

ph_metaphlan <- reorganize_metaphlan_table(metaphlan, 'p')
ph_metaphlan_lst <- sep_one_organ_metaphlan(ge_metaphlan, rem = TRUE, remove_rare = FALSE, prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff, remove_unclassified_column = TRUE, unclassified_threshold = unclassified_threshold)

metaphlan_lst = list("phylum" = ph_metaphlan_lst, "genus" = ge_metaphlan_lst, "species" = sp_metaphlan_lst, "sgb" = t_metaphlan_lst)

# Order features tables and metadata (same samples and normalize)
orig_meta = meta
common = Reduce(intersect, list(sp_metaphlan_lst$vaginal$sample_id, sp_metaphlan_lst$rectal$sample_id, meta$sample_id))
meta = meta %>% filter(sample_id %in% common)
for (level in names(metaphlan_lst)){
  lst = metaphlan_lst[[level]]
  for (organ in names(lst)){
    print(paste0("level = ", level, ", organ = ", organ))
    df = lst[[organ]]
    n_samples = df %>% nrow()
    filt_df = df %>% filter(sample_id %in% common)
    filt_n_samples = filt_df %>% nrow()
    message(paste0(filt_n_samples, " samples were filtered from ", n_samples))
    features_filt_df = remove_rare_features(filt_df, filter_method = 'both', prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff)
    metaphlan_lst[[level]][[organ]] = features_filt_df
  }
}
```

## SGB mapping

```{r}
sgb_map_df = read_delim(file.path("../../StrainPhlan/mpa_vJan21_CHOCOPhlAnSGB_202103_SGB2GTDB.tsv"), delim = "\t", show_col_types = FALSE, col_names = FALSE) 
sgb_2_gtdb = sgb_map_df %>%
              rename("sgb" = "X1", "taxonomy" = "X2") %>%
              mutate(taxonomy = str_replace_all(taxonomy, " ", "_")) %>%
              separate_rows(taxonomy, sep = ";") %>% 
              separate(taxonomy, into = c("key", "value"), sep = "__") %>%
              pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
                mutate(sgb = paste0("t__", sgb))
```

## nGD files

### Load long ngd

```{r}
vaginal_samples = metaphlan_lst$sgb$vaginal$sample_id
rectal_samples = metaphlan_lst$sgb$rectal$sample_id
union_samples = dplyr::union(vaginal_samples, rectal_samples)
```


```{r, message=FALSE}
n = 2
all_files <- paste0(long_path, list.files(long_path, recursive = FALSE))
files_only <- all_files[!file.info(all_files)$isdir]
ngd_lst = list()

for (file_path in files_only){
  name = sub(".*/(.*?)\\_nGD.tsv", "\\1", file_path)
  
  df = read_delim(file_path, delim = "\t", col_names = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
        rename(sample_1 = X1, sample_2 = X2, nGD = X3) %>%
        mutate(sample_1 = str_replace_all(sample_1, c("_CP04600_L001" = "", "CP04600_L00" = "", "_B" = ""))) %>%
        mutate(sample_2 = str_replace_all(sample_2, c("_CP04600_L001" = "", "CP04600_L00" = "", "_B" = ""))) %>%
        mutate(sample_id_1 = str_replace_all(sample_1, "-vaginal|-rectal", "")) %>%
        mutate(sample_id_2 = str_replace_all(sample_2, "-vaginal|-rectal", "")) %>%
        separate(sample_1, into = c("first", "second", "sample_1_organ"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>% select(-c(first, second)) %>%
        separate(sample_2, into = c("first", "second", "sample_2_organ"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>% select(-c(first, second)) %>%
        mutate(same_person = case_when(sample_id_1 == sample_id_2 ~ TRUE, 
                                       sample_id_1 != sample_id_2 ~ FALSE)) %>%
        filter(sample_id_1 %in% union_samples) %>%
        filter(sample_id_2 %in% union_samples) %>%
        mutate(sgb = name) %>%
        left_join(sgb_2_gtdb %>% select(sgb, s), by = "sgb") %>%
        rename("species" = "s")
        
  if (sum(df$same_person, na.rm = TRUE) >= n) { 
    ngd_lst[[name]] = df
  }
}
print(length(ngd_lst))
```

### Wide ngd df

```{r}
all_files <- paste0(wide_path, list.files(wide_path, recursive = FALSE))
files_only <- all_files[!file.info(all_files)$isdir]
mat_lst = list()

for (file_path in files_only){
  name = sub(".*/(.*?)\\_nGD_mat.tsv", "\\1", file_path)
  df = read_delim(file_path, delim = "\t", col_names = TRUE, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
        mutate(ID = str_replace_all(ID, c("_B" = "", "_CP04600_L001" = ""))) %>%
        mutate(ID = str_replace_all(ID, c("_CP04600_L002" = "_2"))) %>%
        rename_with(~ sub("_CP04600_L001", '', .) %>%
                  sub("_B", '', .)) %>%
        rename_with(~ sub("_CP04600_L002", '_2', .))
  mat_lst[[name]] = df
}
```

# Results

## Violin beeswarm

```{r}
get_ngd_violin = function(ngd_curr_lst, alpha_false = 0.1, size_false = 1.5, save_file_name = "ngd_all", n = 2, box = FALSE){
    # Statistical analysis
    ngd_all = do.call("rbind", ngd_curr_lst)
    ngd_for_plot = ngd_all %>%
                as.data.frame() %>%
                group_by(sgb) %>%
                filter(sum(same_person == TRUE) >= n) %>%
                ungroup() %>%
                mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " ")) %>%
                mutate(same_person = factor(same_person, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))) %>%
                select(-c(sample_1, sample_2)) %>%
                filter(sample_1_organ != sample_2_organ) 
    y_position_df = ngd_for_plot %>%
                group_by(species) %>%
                summarise(y_position = max(nGD) - 0.0005) %>% #  - 0.005
                ungroup()
    wilcox_results = ngd_for_plot %>%
                      group_by(species) %>%
                      wilcox_test(nGD ~ same_person) %>%
                      ungroup() %>%
                      mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p, method = 'fdr')) %>%
                      mutate(signif = case_when(p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***", 
                                                p.adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
                                                p.adj < 0.05 ~ "*",
                                                TRUE ~ "ns")) %>%
                      left_join(y_position_df, by = "species") %>% arrange(p.adj) %>%
                      left_join(sgb_2_gtdb %>% select(sgb, s) %>% mutate(species = str_replace_all(s, "_", " ")), by = "species") %>%
                      arrange("p.adg") %>%
                      mutate(species = factor(species))
    
    ngd_for_plot = ngd_for_plot %>%
                    mutate(species = factor(species, levels = wilcox_results$species))
    
    # Plot
    ngd_all_plot = ggplot(data = ngd_for_plot, aes(x = same_person, y = nGD)) 
    
    if (box){
      save_wilcox_df = wilcox_results %>% select(c(species, sgb, n1, n2, p, p.adj, signif)) %>%
                      rename("fdr" = "p.adj")
      write.csv(save_wilcox_df, file = paste0(save_dir, "wilcoxon_", save_file_name, ".csv"))
      message(paste0("Wilcoxon saved to ", "wilcoxon_", save_file_name, ".csv"))
    
      ngd_all_plot = ngd_all_plot +
                      geom_boxplot(color = 'black', fill = '#D9E1EC', alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
                      geom_point(aes(fill = same_person, alpha = same_person, size = same_person), color = 'black', shape = 21, position = position_jitter(width = 0.2))
    } else {
      ngd_all_plot = ngd_all_plot +
                      geom_beeswarm(aes(fill = same_person, alpha = same_person, size = same_person), color = 'black', groupOnX = TRUE, pch = 21)
    }
    
    ngd_all_plot = ngd_all_plot +
                    theme_bw(base_family = "Gafata") +
                    facet_wrap(~species, nrow = 3, scales = "free_y") +
                    stat_pvalue_manual(wilcox_results, label = "signif", y.position = "y_position", size = 15, hide.ns = TRUE) +
                    labs(x = "Same woman", y = "nGD") +
                    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0A9396", "orange"), name = "") +
                    scale_alpha_manual(values = c(alpha_false, 0.8), name = "") +
                    scale_size_manual(values = c(size_false, 2.5), name = "") +
                    theme(legend.position = "none") +
                    theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#FEFCFD")) +
                    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
                    theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 60),
                          axis.text = element_text(size = 50),
                          strip.text = element_text(size = 40))
    return(list("plot" = ngd_all_plot, "stats_results" = wilcox_results))
}
```

### Plot

```{r}
ngd_all_lst_violin = get_ngd_violin(ngd_lst, box = FALSE)
ggsave(ngd_all_lst_violin[["plot"]], file = paste0(save_dir, "ngd_all_violin.png"), height = 7, width = 15, dpi = 300)
```

## PCoA plot

### Preparation

```{r}
pcoa_lst = list()
segment_lst = list()
for (name in names(ngd_lst)){
  # PCoA data
  long_df = ngd_lst[[name]]
  wide_df = mat_lst[[name]]
  ord_long_df = long_df %>%
            filter(sample_1_organ != sample_2_organ)
  all_samples = dplyr::union(ord_long_df$sample_1, ord_long_df$sample_2)
  ord_wide_df = wide_df %>%
                column_to_rownames("ID")
  dist = as.dist(ord_wide_df)
  pcoa_res = pcoa(dist)
  pcoa_values = pcoa_res$vectors %>%
                  as.data.frame() %>%
                  select(1:2) %>%
                  rownames_to_column("full_sample_id") %>%
                  separate(full_sample_id, into = c("sample_id1", "sample_id2", "organ"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>%
                  mutate(sample_id = paste(sample_id1, sample_id2, sep = "-")) %>%
                  select(-c(sample_id1, sample_id2)) %>%
                  mutate(organ = str_remove(organ, "_2")) %>%
                  rename("PCoA1" = "Axis.1", "PCoA2" = "Axis.2") %>%
                  mutate(species = unique(long_df$species)) %>%
                  mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " "))
  pcoa_lst[[name]] = pcoa_values

  # Segments data
  label_samples = long_df %>% filter(same_person == TRUE) %>% pull(sample_id_1)
  seg_df = pcoa_values %>% filter(sample_id %in% label_samples) 
  vag_seg_df = seg_df %>% filter(organ == "vaginal") %>% rename("x" = "PCoA1", "y" = "PCoA2")
  rec_seg_df = seg_df %>% filter(organ == "rectal") %>% rename("xend" = "PCoA1", "yend" = "PCoA2")
  full_seg_df = vag_seg_df %>% left_join(rec_seg_df, by = c("sample_id", "species")) %>%
                select(-matches("full_sample_id|organ")) %>%
                select(c(sample_id, x, y, xend, yend, species))
  segment_lst[[name]] = full_seg_df
}
```

```{r}
filter_sgbs = function(df, sgbs){
  filt_df = df %>%
           rownames_to_column("sgb") %>%
           separate(sgb, into = c("sgb", "num"), sep = "\\.") %>%
           select(-c("num")) %>%
           filter(sgb %in% sgbs)
  return(filt_df)
}

n = 2
pcoa_all = do.call("rbind", pcoa_lst)
segment_all = do.call("rbind", segment_lst)
ngd_for_plot = ngd_all %>%
                as.data.frame() %>%
                group_by(sgb) %>%
                filter(sum(same_person == TRUE) >= n) %>%
                ungroup()
pcoa_all = filter_sgbs(pcoa_all, unique(ngd_for_plot$sgb))
pcoa_all = pcoa_all %>% mutate(species = factor(species, levels = shared_to_random_lst_box$stats_results$species))
segment_all = filter_sgbs(segment_all, unique(ngd_for_plot$sgb))
segment_all = segment_all %>% mutate(species = factor(species, levels = shared_to_random_lst_box$stats_results$species))
```

### Plot

```{r}
labels = c("vaginal" = "Vaginal", "rectal" = "Rectal")
get_pcoa_plot = function(df, segment_df, nrow = 5){
  ggplot(data = df) +
              geom_point(aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, fill = organ, shape = organ), size = 2, color = "#4B4C4C", alpha = 0.5) + 
              scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24), labels = labels, name = "") +
              scale_fill_manual(values = c("vaginal" = "#F09870", "rectal" = "#057D7F"), labels = labels, name = "") +
              geom_segment(data = segment_df, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend), linewidth = 1.1, color = "#620508", lineend='round') +
              theme_bw(base_family = "Gafata") +
              facet_wrap(~species, nrow = nrow, scales = "free") +
              theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
              theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F8EBC3")) +
              theme(text = element_text(size = 40)) +
              theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 43)) +
              theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
              theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 30))
}
pcoa_plot = get_pcoa_plot(pcoa_all, segment_all, nrow = 3)
ggsave(pcoa_plot, file = paste0(save_dir, "all_samples_pcoa_distances_with_legend_transparent.png"), height = 7, width = 12, dpi = 300)
```

## Z score Heatmap

### Functions

```{r}
order_wide_matrix = function(zscore_df, color_column, order_vactor){
  wide_df = zscore_df %>% 
            mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " ")) %>%
            filter(sample_1_organ != sample_2_organ) %>%
            filter(same_person == TRUE) %>%
            select(c(sample_id_1, !!as.name(color_column), species)) %>%
            spread(species, !!as.name(color_column)) %>% column_to_rownames("sample_id_1") 
  heat_df = wide_df[order(rowSums(is.na(wide_df)), decreasing = T),]
  heat_df = heat_df[order_vector] #heat_df[order(colSums(heat_df), decreasing = T)]
  
  heat_mat = heat_df %>% t() %>% as.matrix()
  return(heat_mat)
}

get_row_anno = function(ngd_long_all, order_vactor){
  ngd_df = ngd_long_all %>% select(c(species, nGD, sample_id_1)) %>% mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " "))
  ngd_df$species = factor(ngd_df$species, levels = order_vector)
  ngd_lst = split(ngd_df$nGD, ngd_df$species)
  lt = lapply(ngd_lst, function(x) data.frame(density(x)[c("x", "y")]))
  return(lt)
}

get_heatmap = function(zscore_df, color_col, order_vactor){
  main_color_mat = order_wide_matrix(zscore_df, color_col, order_vactor)
  pval_mat = order_wide_matrix(zscore_df, "pval")
  ngd_lst = get_row_anno(ngd_long_all)
  costum_cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill){
    if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.0001) {
        grid.text("***", x, y)
    } else if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.001) {
        grid.text("**", x, y)
    } else if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.01) {
        grid.text("*", x, y)
    }
  }
  
  ## Plot
  col_fun = colorRamp2(seq(min(main_color_mat, na.rm = TRUE), max(main_color_mat, na.rm = TRUE), length = 5), (c("#CA6702","#fcc411","#fcf1d0","#C47EC4","#802780")))
  
  ha = rowAnnotation(nGD = anno_joyplot(ngd_lst, width = unit(5, "cm"), 
                                        gp = gpar(fill = "#778DA9"), 
                                        transparency = 0.6),
                            annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16))
  h = Heatmap(main_color_mat, name = color_col, col = col_fun, na_col = "#EBEDF0",
              cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill){
                if (!is.na(pval_mat[i, j])){
                  if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.0001) {
                      grid.text("***", x, y)
                  } else if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.001) {
                      grid.text("**", x, y)
                  } else if(pval_mat[i, j] < 0.01) {
                      grid.text("*", x, y)
                  }
                } 
              },
              cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, show_row_dend = FALSE, show_column_dend = FALSE,
              row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14), left_annotation = ha, 
              row_names_max_width = unit(30, "cm"),
              rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1),
              heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal"))
  
  save_filname = paste0(save_dir, "sgbs_to_individual_heatmap_diff_organ_mean", color_col, "_times.png")
  png(save_filname, 
    width = 1300, height = 600)
  draw(h, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom", padding = unit(c(2, 2, 2, 15), "mm"))
  dev.off()
}
```

### Plot

```{r}
conflicts_prefer(circlize::colorRamp2)
ngd_long_all = do.call("rbind", ngd_lst) 
n = 2
levels_species_df = shared_to_random_lst_box$stats_results %>%
                    mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, " ", "_"))
ngd_long_all = ngd_long_all %>%
                as.data.frame() %>%
                group_by(sgb) %>%
                filter(sum(same_person == TRUE) >= n) %>%
                ungroup()  
zscore_df = ngd_long_all %>%
            group_by(sgb) %>%
            mutate(sd = sd(nGD), mean = mean(nGD)) %>%
            mutate(zscore = (nGD - mean(nGD))/sd(nGD)) %>%
            mutate(pval = pnorm(zscore, mean = 0, sd = 1, lower.tail = TRUE)) %>%
            mutate(fdr = p.adjust (pval, method = 'BH')) %>%
            ungroup(sgb) %>%
            mutate(species = factor(species, levels = levels_species_df$species))
            # mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " "))

ngd_mat = ngd_long_all %>%
          select(c(species, nGD, sample_id_1))

order_vector = zscore_df %>% arrange(sd) %>% distinct(species) %>% mutate(species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " ")) %>% pull(species)
h_zscore = get_heatmap(zscore_df, "zscore", order_vector)
```
